question_text: Which of the following is the correct definition of density?

options.label: A
options.text: The amount of space an object takes up

options.label: B
options.text: The mass of a substance per unit volume

options.label: C
options.text: The weight of an object divided by its height

options.label: D
options.text: How heavy an object feels when you hold it

explanation: Density measures how much mass (or how much 'stuff') is packed into a certain volume. It tells us how tightly packed the particles are in a material.
